title: Recommendation
description: FROZEN CONTRACT. The final ranked shortlist the orchestrator produces from a set of Quotes for one RequirementSpec. Every claim in top_pick.reasoning must be backed by an evidence_ref that points at a real transcript line. The web app renders this; it never computes ranking itself. Do not rename fields without telling the whole team.

requirement_spec_id.description: The confirmed RequirementSpec this recommendation answers. Must match the spec reused verbatim across every call.

ranked_listing_ids.description: All quoted listings, best first. Ordered by effective_monthly_cost with risk_flag as a tie-breaker/penalty (orchestrator owns the exact rule).

listing_id.description: The single recommended listing. Must appear in ranked_listing_ids (normally first).

reasoning.description: Plain-language explanation of why this is the top pick. Every factual claim must be traceable via evidence_refs.

evidence_refs.description: Links from the reasoning to specific transcript lines. Never assert a negotiated number or concession without one.

listing_id.description: Which call's transcript this evidence lives in.

line_index.description: Zero-based line index within that call's transcript.

quote_field.description: Optional: which Quote field this line substantiates, e.g. 'base_rent', 'price_moved', 'fraud_signals'.

generated_at.description: Optional ISO 8601 timestamp when the recommendation was computed.
